verses.1: Praise the LORD! For it is good to sing praises to our God; For it is pleasant and praise is beautiful.
verses.2: The LORD builds up Jerusalem; He gathers the outcasts of Israel.
verses.3: He heals the brokenhearted And binds up their wounds.
verses.4: He counts the number of the stars; He gives names to all of them.
verses.5: Great is our Lord and abundant in strength; His understanding is infinite.
verses.6: The LORD supports the afflicted; He brings the wicked down to the ground.
verses.7: Sing to the LORD with thanksgiving; Sing praises to our God on the lyre;
verses.8: It is He who covers the heavens with clouds, Who provides rain for the earth, Who makes grass sprout on the mountains.
verses.9: It is He who gives an animal its food, And feeds young ravens that cry.
verses.10: He does not delight in the strength of the horse; He does not take pleasure in the legs of a man.
verses.11: The LORD favors those who fear Him, Those who wait for His faithfulness.
verses.12: Praise the LORD, Jerusalem! Praise your God, Zion!
verses.13: For He has strengthened the bars of your gates; He has blessed your sons among you.
verses.14: He makes peace in your borders; He satisfies you with the finest of the wheat.
verses.15: He sends His command to the earth; His word runs very swiftly.
verses.16: He showers snow like wool; He scatters the frost like ashes.
verses.17: He hurls His ice as fragments; Who can stand before His cold?
verses.18: He sends His word and makes them melt; He makes His wind blow, and the waters flow.
verses.19: He declares His words to Jacob, His statutes and His judgments to Israel.
verses.20: He has not dealt this way with any other nation; And as for His judgments, they have not known them. Praise the LORD!
